pi_items.source: Web search across multiple financial data providers (cbonds, Morgan Stanley, Fidelity, Euronext, etc.) confirming Apple Inc as the legal name for AAPL
Web search confirms AAPL is the ticker symbol for Apple Inc traded on NASDAQ
Web search across multiple financial exchanges (cbonds, Morgan Stanley, Fidelity, Euronext, Deutsche Boerse, Vienna Stock Exchange) confirming US0378331005 as the ISIN for Apple Inc
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 14) which copies source file from /workspace/data/aapl_historical_quotes.csv to the specified destination path
Direct inspection of CSV file at /workspace/data/aapl_historical_quotes.csv using wc -l and Python script. File contains 125 lines total: 1 header line + 124 data rows
Direct inspection of CSV file first data row. First quote date is 2024-01-02 with closing price 185.64
Direct inspection of CSV file last data row. Last quote date is 2024-06-28 with closing price 210.62

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims verified. The task imports historical daily closing prices for Apple Inc (AAPL, ISIN US0378331005) from a CSV file containing 124 quotes spanning January 2, 2024 to June 28, 2024. The data represents real historical Apple stock prices from the 2024 trading period. CSV file uses semicolon delimiter with Date and Quote columns as specified.
